metadata.title: States PCS: Chhattisgarh GK for CGPSC Exams

questions.question: Which temple in Malhar is renowned for showcasing the early medieval architectural style of Chhattisgarh?
questions.explanation: Pataleshwar Temple in Malhar, dedicated to Lord Shiva, exemplifies early medieval Kalachuri architecture with its unique stone carvings and religious motifs.

questions.question: During the medieval Kalachuri dynasty’s rule in Chhattisgarh, which language was predominantly used in official inscriptions and temple records?
questions.explanation: Sanskrit was the main language for Kalachuri inscriptions in Chhattisgarh, emphasizing classical tradition in administration and religion.
